disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The contraceptive implant in the upper arm is overdue for removal — it was due to be replaced about six months ago
trigger_question_examples: How long have you had the implant?
When was it due to be replaced?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had the arm implant for years. It was supposed to be swapped out about six months ago but I never got around to booking it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness, swelling, warmth and severe pain developed over the implant site over the past 24 hours
trigger_question_examples: What does the skin over it look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yesterday the skin over the implant went red and hot and swelled up, and it's got more painful and redder since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe throbbing pain over the site, markedly worse on any movement of the arm, with guarding
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the pain and what makes it worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It throbs badly and any time I bend or straighten my arm it's agony, so I'm just holding it against my chest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels feverish and shivery — early systemic feature accompanying the local skin infection
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt hot, feverish or shivery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do feel a bit hot and shivery, like I'm coming down with something.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absence of severe systemic-emergency features — no confusion, no uncontrollable shaking/rigors, and the redness has not suddenly raced up the arm or formed dark blisters
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling confused or drowsy?
Is the redness spreading rapidly up the arm, or any blistering, or shaking chills you can't control?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not confused and I'm not shaking uncontrollably. The redness is bad but it hasn't shot up my arm and there are no blisters.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is anxious about the infection spreading into the bloodstream
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone with you at home?
How are you managing on your own with this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and I'm scared this is going to get into my blood and I won't notice in time.
